fileOverrides.reason: Package layout intentionally groups the reviewed production domain modules into one package source. The aquatic slice extracts shared collision response into one ordinary generated C function; per-function limits remain unchanged.
The QA package intentionally keeps the complete end-to-end domain oracle together; the corresponding function override remains separately bounded.

functionOverrides.reason: The QA-only self-check is a deliberate aggregate oracle. Production domain functions remain under the ordinary budget.
